benefits.description: $100 Annual Hotel Credit (Booked through Chase Travel)

reviewNotes: This example is intentionally limited to trackable credits. Earning multipliers, partner transfer changes, and one-year promotional subscriptions belong in reviewer notes unless the product adds recurring user-trackable value.
